rule_text: Battery shall not be discharged below 22.0 V during eclipse
operator_action: Operator must verify SOC > 30% before entering eclipse

rule_text: Solar array deployment shall not be commanded while in eclipse
Reaction wheel commanded RPM shall not exceed +/- 5500
operator_action: Limit CMD_ADCS_RW_SPIN argument to within bounds

rule_text: ADCS mode transition to INERTIAL requires star tracker lock
operator_action: Verify TLM_ADCS_STAR_LOCK == LOCKED before CMD_ADCS_MODE_SET INERTIAL

rule_text: Transmitter shall not be enabled while ground station is below 5 deg elevation
Memory patches shall be uplinked only during contact passes with full uplink margin
operator_action: Operator must obtain second-operator concurrence for CMD_CDH_MEM_PATCH

rule_text: Battery heater shall remain on whenever battery temperature < 5 degC
operator_action: FDIR_THM_002 will autonomously enable; verify within 30s

rule_text: Imaging shall not be commanded while ADCS is in SAFE
Instrument shall not be powered on while detector temperature > 20 degC
Burns shall not be executed with tank pressure < 1000 kPa

operator_action: Two operators must both confirm before CMD_PROP_BURN_EXEC

rule_text: Propellant temperature shall remain above 5 degC at all times
